text: TABLE 3012 - Common Complications of Acute Kidney Injury METABOLIC ~ CARDIOVASCULAR GASTROINTESTINAL NEUROLOGIC ~ HEMATOLOGIC INFECTIOUS OTHER Hyperkalemia ~ Pumonary edema Nausea Neuromuscular Anemia Preumonia Hicoups iritabilty Metabolic acidosis ~ Arthythmias Vomiting Asterixis Bleading Septicemia Elevated parathyroid hormone level Hyponatremia Pericarditis Malnutition Seizures Urinary tract Low total triodothyronine and thyroxine infection levels Hypocalcemia Pericardial effusion Hemorhage Mental status changes Hyperphosphatemia Pulmonary embolism Hypermagnesemia _ Hypertension Hyperuricemia Myocardial infarction
